══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kalashtar — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Kalashtar — Iron Concentration (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kalashtar — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Kalashtar — Iron Concentration. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Kalashtar — Iron Concentration.
→ Kalashtar — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:6+8=14 vs DC 20] FAIL! 37 necrotic damage. HP: 30/67
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kalashtar — Iron Concentration --- HP: 30/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
